title: 'One Battle After Another' star Chase Infiniti poised to become latest Best Actress Oscar nominee up for her film debut
text: Chase Infiniti's Awards Recognition. Based on the article, Chase Infiniti has received recognition at multiple prestigious awards ceremonies for her role in 'One Battle After Another': Awards Won/Nominated: Critics' Choice Awards; Golden Globe Awards; Actor Awards; BAFTA Awards (longlisted). Oscar Predictions: The article indicates she currently ranks in the top five for Best Actress Oscar predictions at 76%, positioning her behind Rose Byrne (95%), Jessie Buckley (94%), Renate Reinsve (89%), and Emma Stone (82%). Historical Significance: If nominated for an Oscar, Infiniti would join a select group of actresses nominated for Best Actress in their film debuts, including Julie Andrews, Barbra Streisand, and Shirley Booth—four of whom have won the award. The article notes that 'Infiniti has been going along with the momentum' of her film's success, which won major critics' association prizes and multiple Golden Globe Awards for director Paul Thomas Anderson.
